hooks.command: sh -c 'p="${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/deck_session_start.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$(dirname "${PLUGIN_ROOT}")"; p="$(ls -t "$d"/*/hooks/deck_session_start.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; fi; exec python3 "$p"'

sh -c 'p="${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/deck_prompt_router.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$(dirname "${PLUGIN_ROOT}")"; p="$(ls -t "$d"/*/hooks/deck_prompt_router.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; fi; exec python3 "$p"'

sh -c 'p="${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/pattern_generalization_check.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$(dirname "${PLUGIN_ROOT}")"; p="$(ls -t "$d"/*/hooks/pattern_generalization_check.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; fi; exec python3 "$p"'
